news_items.headline: Ohtani 'out of sync' with catcher, rebounds for wi...
news_items.summary: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani got the win on the mound after overcoming a rough second inning in which he and Dalton Rushing got crossed up on a pitch that got past the catcher's glove, allowing a run to score.

news_items.headline: Pirates put 1B Horwitz (hamstring) on 10-day IL
news_items.summary: The Pirates have placed first baseman Spencer Horwitz on the 10-day injured list because of a left hamstring strain.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Swanson ups RBI total to 15 in Mets series
news_items.summary: Dansby Swanson had 11 RBIs in the Cubs' doubleheader sweep of the Mets, breaking the franchise record of 10 set by Hall of Famer Ron Santo on July 6, 1970.

news_items.headline: Cardinals elevate DeWitt to chief executive office...
news_items.summary: Bill DeWitt III was named chief executive officer of the St. Louis Cardinals on Wednesday after serving as team president since 2008.

news_items.headline: Yankees put McMahon on IL with throat infection
news_items.summary: The Yankees put infielder Ryan McMahon on the 10-day injured list due to a throat infection and recalled utility player Oswaldo Cabrera from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre.

news_items.headline: MLB wants max 5 years for FAs changing teams
news_items.summary: As part of the next CBA with players, MLB wants a maximum contract length of 5 years for free agents who are switching teams, while organizations will have the ability to keep their own players for up to 6 years, calling it a Cornerstone Player Provision.

news_items.headline: Sources: Cubs acquiring LHP Peterson from Mets
news_items.summary: The Cubs are acquiring left-hander David Peterson from the Mets in return for minor league infielder Cole Mathis, the teams announced Thursday.

news_items.headline: MLB Power Rankings: A No. 2 debut and a powerhouse...
news_items.summary: As we hit the official midway point of the 2026 season with teams playing their 81st games this week, our top 10 sees a bit of a shake-up.

news_items.headline: Rays' Craig Kimbrel allows 1-out, 9th-inning homer to spoil combined no-hitter against Royals
news_items.summary: Matt Garza threw the only no-hitter in Rays franchise history in 2010 against the Tigers.

news_items.summary: Cubs average attendance is down this year, to date.

news_items.summary: Declining play and rising cost are two things the Cincinnati Reds won’t continue to roster.
